content.text:
[Sun 2026-03-08 13:13 CDT] Fact-Check Assignment: E-commerce Testing Standards Verification

Queue these verification targets (I will send specific claims soon):

TARGET1: "Page load time < 2 seconds" - verify current Google/retail standard
TARGET2: "Checkout response < 500ms" - verify industry benchmark
TARGET3: "80% unit test coverage" - verify recommended percentage
TARGET4: PCI-DSS 4.0 specific testing mandates
TARGET5: Tool performance claims (Playwright parallel execution speeds, etc.)

Stand by for specific claims to verify with authoritative sources.
Continue where you left off. The previous model attempt failed or timed out.

arguments.query: current Google/retail standard for page load time
